name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new validator, data update, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem

What gap or pain point is this feature solving?

### Proposed solution

What would you like helakit to do? Sketch the API if it helps.

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

### Additional context

Links, references, or examples from the wild.
